title: bothriocline marginata
intro: Bothriocline marginata, also known as the Blue Margined Bothriocline, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Bothriocline marginata include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic and insect repellent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by boiling the leaves in water or mixing them with other herbal remedies.
